content.title: Implement: restrict next to todo only
content.description:
Spec: .agentic/specs/next-todo-only-spec.md

Single-line change: in Tracker.next(), change the status filter from [idea, todo, in-progress] to [todo] only.

Files to modify:
- src/core/tracker.ts — status filter in next() method
- Tests — update existing next tests + add exclusion tests for idea/in-progress statuses
- Optionally update NO_ISSUES_AVAILABLE message clarity

Acceptance: next only returns todo issues. Tests pass. All quality gates green.

content.content: Implementation verified by CTO. Changes match the spec: status filter narrowed from [idea, todo, in-progress] to [todo] only in tracker.ts next() method. All 14 tests pass. Message updated from 'No unblocked issues found' to 'No todo issues found'. The key exclusion test now confirms idea and in-progress issues are excluded even with higher priority. Marking as done — forwarding to validation.

CTO review found 3 failing CLI integration tests in tests/cli/commands.test.ts. The developer updated unit tests in tracker-next.test.ts but missed the CLI integration tests for 'next'. Same fix needed: add status: 'todo' to issues created in those CLI tests. Failing tests: 'returns the best issue for a user', 'excludes blocked issues', 'resolved blockage treated as unblocked'. Creating follow-up fix task.

Done. Changed Tracker.next() status filter from [idea, todo, in-progress] to [todo] only. Updated NO_ISSUES_AVAILABLE message from 'No unblocked issues found' to 'No todo issues found'. Updated all existing tests (tracker-next.test.ts + commands.test.ts CLI tests) to create issues with status:todo where needed. Rewrote the status exclusion test to verify only todo is included and idea/in-progress are excluded. All 573 tests pass, typecheck and lint clean.
